title: phaius australis var. bernaysii
intro: Phaius australis var. bernaysii, also known as the Australian orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phaius australis var. bernaysii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Phaius australis var. bernaysii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies in various parts of the world.
